content: We can reframe the original Self-Refine framework as a modular 'skeleton' that can be augmented with multiple inconsistent self-perspectives from LLM self-reflection mechanisms to unlock stronger refinement without additional training or supervision. This creates a hybrid approach where Self-Refine’s iterative feedback loop is enriched by the diverse critical lenses that self-reflection mechanisms generate, rather than relying on a single model’s monolithic self-feedback.
